CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAKHAR, BALDEV S. INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TAKHAR TRUCKING POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $16,392.71 DAMAGES, $1,975.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $535.00 COSTS, $1,019.23 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,921.94, PROPERTY VALUE IS $12,500. -SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT-
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
